content: Self-Refine can act as the lightweight, task-specific iterative feedback engine that refines the raw self-reflective memory traces generated by the Reflexion autonomous agent, creating a two-layer self-improvement pipeline that requires no external supervision or additional training. This hybrid architecture leverages Self-Refine’s strength in sharpening individual outputs to fix the common problem of Reflexion agents accumulating vague, un-actionable reflective memories over time.
